I have been to a number of Pizza Hut outlets across India and this one her is by far the best outlet I've been to.

The staff here is super warm, food preparation is up to mark. Cleanliness is top notch, lot of seating options and good enough for 4 to 8 people tops.

Super accessible location and lots of parking space available in the vicinity as well.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipONhRThi5xiEwcMIWXN-jOVBxrtMADKciG-oVul&fid=0x0:0x844a573e77077c2a"],"When":"2019-11-29"},{"Name":"Mohd Mehtab","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWqUzBbOkF1bZY5t0_ZxDihiw_ZIwf-2ySPs8qOxySO0oUJ2E9f7g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is my favourite place to eat pizza, because of their sitting and serving arrangements. This place has quite big place for sitting and no noise is there too.

Accidently I went there and now whenever I go to saket or malviya nagar I must go for this place.

If I talk about taste then yes taste is very good as compared to their rivalry Domino's.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipNAOfgR2pgsJMQLwK4Uta-YbvgsPPZ4jPAg5BVF&fid=0x0:0x844a573e77077c2a"],"When":"2021-8-9"},{"Name":"anusha gupta","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJh-lteMmHqFGAqJth7o2GVUzuHo6XaRmclWBbiGzdTV1sHXTsx=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This pizza hit outlet was by far the best I've visited till date, cozy space with two floors, ground floor for order & billing, the 1st floor is for sitting, with an outside view from the window. The best part is this outlet has a washroom.

The service was quick with proper cutlery given. The pizza was good too. I had momo mia pizza & veg kebab pizza, both tasted good.

The decor is also pleasing, aesthetic & well lit, with lots of options to click good pictures.

The location of the outlet is also easy to reach, just beside the PVR Anupam complex.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipPxauDEW66T0SvLyknwSowNMw3vG2FsK3J6xP61&fid=0x0:0x844a573e77077c2a"],"When":"2022-3-9"}]

Must try the combo and thank me later.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Gummadivalli Shiva Kumar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX9KpRk9Vl8IZ5IJaFxJ7-XCIMMb-SkEI9QfWTSfiB34nRJASRAMw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The place is good for a quick tasty bite. I had a voucher given by SBI credit cards and, unlike many other places, the staff readily accepted it with out any hesitation. I must say that the pizza I ate here is incomparable to pizza from its rivals like 'La pinaz pizza' or 'Domino's Pizza', it's just better. I'm sure I'll visit this place multiple times, coz in my opinion eating the best pizza is the art of living with flavourful moments.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipPsfsn-O8Ks4108HOzru5HNscmhMOftLTIiUflI&fid=0x0:0x3b58c7f43e0ffb7a"],"When":"2022-9-29"},{"Name":"shubhi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVN5Rls0VvKkqt9Mg6K8PR3ofSMPmcCwZFpObKqvGDr05XOk_NWvg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"April 2021 - The pizza hut experience 😅 Their pizza is ok ok same is the story of garlic bread.

[{"Name":"224 md sahil","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKI8s0JiYyn9v4O7wODNbwQ1Q6PRvncXzVtMCvEpnQ3oD7ruQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently visited Pizza Hut and had an amazing experience! The food was absolutely delicious, especially the cheesy garlic bread and the classic pan pizza. The ambiance was welcoming, and everything was clean and well-maintained.
A special shoutout to Ankita from the staff, who made our visit even better. She was polite, attentive, and ensured we had everything we needed. Her friendly attitude and great customer service really stood out.
Overall, it was a fantastic dining experience, and I’ll definitely be visiting again soon. Highly recommend Pizza Hut for anyone craving delicious pizza and great service!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Malti Bera","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIwZf-GMze-7gJU39nU7lRBRFC2Z0qQaUdd0WhshqEeHDaV=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Had a amazing experience. The pizza was so delicious, I can not even tell how  I enjoyed there. And we met a amazing staff at there. The girl from the staff name was ankita she was so kind so helping so polite with client . The service she was giving so amazing. Overall every one should visit pizza hut","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Apsara Jahan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXnknwEiErdyYLx2nLxGCUvnea1iwo53XsrqOvgaYWSKrKQox8=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Had an amazing experience at Pizza Hut! The pizza was delicious, and the service was top-notch. Ankita from the staff was exceptional—super friendly and attentive, making our visit even better. Highly recommend for great food and fantastic service!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Subbanshu Jaiin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJp0vUaw27Zqpwi6T3T2zojXzNKPTG1jS5skVXuWkGrYkiIAg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"I have visited Pizza hut in nehru place. This outlet is said to be Delivery outlet PHD but there is sitting capacity for approx 20 people also.

The staff is attentive and promptly take orders and make pizza's as per request.

There were some  annoying things about their menu and availability.  Like they dont have Pet bottle of Pepsi available. They dont have Masala Lemonade available. Pepsi Black can available but not normal Pepsi Can.
They have Fountain Pepsi available but that we dont like it.

What i dont like about Pizza hut is that this outlet dont give cutlery like fork and knife, to eat pizzas while dining in. Moreover Pizza Hut removes Mustard Sauce from all their outlets and serve only Tomato Sauce.

In the menu they have removed Double Cheese Margharita Pizza as well.

Sope overall i am not happy with Pizza Hut the way they changing their standards downwards.

Staff behaivour and service is still good. Food taste is fine too. i.guess that is saving pizza hut to larger extent.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipM6l5aM1Ysvb9X2Xc0HElfrvFNnYeQ4XKstn3d0&fid=0x0:0x928b800805971a"],"When":"2023-5-4"},{"Name":"Harmanjot Singh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU89uhoGu9HhKXGMZGGVvA0UeH3U024QdpOg_21cYLnZn56FDRzMA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I recently tried Pizza Hut's San Francisco Style Pizza. First and foremost, the crust of the San Francisco Style Pizza stood out. It was thin and crispy, reminiscent of the characteristic crust found in San Francisco-style pizza. The crust had a pleasant crunch, providing a delightful textural contrast to the toppings. It held up well, even with a generous amount of toppings, and didn't become soggy or floppy. The balance between the toppings and the crust was well-maintained, creating a harmonious flavor profile.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipNurswX6sUMQ1809V6O2f2b1pf0rqpjl3dsQr_o&fid=0x0:0x928b800805971a"],"When":"2023-6-9"},{"Name":"MOHD ASLAM","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXTAqYEfqR6LUwSh0DCHMFBBEQHmvMRQ2Q0ATBKYM-wa4yfRAIPLQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Their pizza was good. It is definitely CT great and lovely place to enjoy pizza. I found this particular hut outlet quite interesting. Though the place was very crowded when I first visited, arrgh, I had to squeeze myself in.

The atmosphere was great and and the ambience was okay. The sitting space is wide and the place is partitioned into two sections. One for signature ice cream and one for pizza hut.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipO10INqNhY9nTlL37y6MQ2laJvMscpRn5Q9eeKs&fid=0x0:0x928b800805971a"],"When":"2023-4-8"},{"Name":"Vipul Jain","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX59g1nUruHs49AXa7GWDqwUYycbEFKjY8F-B8WdzsEej4WW3m8eQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Surely Pizza Hut is underrated right now and I have to admit that their "Meal For 1" is the best deal in the market, I mean where you get only a small farmhouse pizza for 250 in Dominos, here for the price you can get that same pizza with so much cheese (not mayonnaise like in dominos) which comes with 2 averaged size Garlic Bread and Small Pepsi!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipMbPrDaBpDkb-L359xEk3Nd0kyGy8mNeyg1pPxT&fid=0x0:0x928b800805971a"],"When":"2020-10-20"},{"Name":"manmeet singh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWODf52c41mB3QDq_xE2akSeNoFdMox_1NkHHx9uk6ZUa6O0v3R=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Pizza Hut as you all know is a great brand, some of their outlets are not up to the mark but pizza still is delicious. We ordered few pizza from here and they were really delicious. Filled up crust is the best part and pizza were still very warm and fresh. Maybe don't go for a sit in a dn just order as this place does get crowded and might not recommend that at rush hours. Rest the pizza's are just amazing and even verg pizza's are fresh all the time. Follow me on Instagram :@Spoonforkchicken","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipNq7NfEYXjdXb_DQeWhaRBiNcVnalN0Vk9xnqTl&fid=0x0:0x928b800805971a"],"When":"2019-9-25"}]

Similar experience faced 2-3 times earlier also hence forced to put it up here","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipPflkEh6j7sxHEZI21sdo1P3yjkVfup2B9Mv0kM&fid=0x0:0x403aba2666a6287c"],"When":"2024-8-4"},{"Name":"GREEDY PIG","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXk2_Y40SswjzX4-r7i3uAmJHhX4WFd81-yY3JamCozn7yZIV0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The outlet in Green Park will have to do a bit more to stand up for the standards which PH has set which looks lacking now. They look like under staffed and the store buckles a lot under pressure during high turnout/peak hours! Menu wise it’s the standard PH menu. They have soups, salads, Pastas & spaghettis along with thin crust and pan pizzas & combo meals. They also have many mocktails and ice creams with Sundaes and Fudges…. the works

They are spacious enough but the turn around time is slow along with service only because they may have to beef up their personnel strength. Hope they do that so it will be more convenient and pleasant. Food wise there is no problem everything is nice and tasty. Hope they gear up and shape up soon!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipMrQQEOLr0TszyA6p_lxpVR9ucpll0eSXD7NTPB&fid=0x0:0x403aba2666a6287c"],"When":"2018-7-30"},{"Name":"Suraj Nagar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIRA8davgNgBGm2IVAShNQFhhZnjpMszQaz3v0KB7JgrZ1_pg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Good I Love my pizza was great 👍😃 yummy 😋","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ajit Kumar Barek","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKEVRC7-mppXtgf2iMXSZM2hH1ngLMcpgq7xZnen59RZZcDqg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Table doesn't have the knife and spoon. 2 plate was there for 3 person. There was a thread or strand of hair on my pizza (corn and cheese), I don't know what exactly it was (you can see in the picture as well, right-hand side). But It was the worst ever pizza","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipPgaLu3r4ybi2lRLBHKPXMVQMtMP96GBLsGpczf&fid=0x0:0x6d06b2154121ee6c"],"When":"2024-9-16"},{"Name":"Subbanshu Jaiin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJp0vUaw27Zqpwi6T3T2zojXzNKPTG1jS5skVXuWkGrYkiIAg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I visited this newly renovated Pizza Hut outlet in Janpath. The interiors are really good and I am glad pizza Hut is focusing now to upgrade themselves.

This is Table service outlet and you can place your order on the table.
They have a huge seating arrangement of around 100 people.

I ordered Margharita Pizza with extra topping of cheese. They made the pizza exactly according to my liking and it was very tasty. The staff is very well behaved and polite . The service was very quick and food quality was good and as per Pizza Hut standards.
One thing i am not liking is pizza Hut now not offering mustard sauce and their Tomato ketchup is also very commercial.
Rest everything was good.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipOHIRS3OLparmL8wTmhUjhAUYrIz5_9ofFUZ_Pl&fid=0x0:0x6d06b2154121ee6c"],"When":"2023-9-2"},{"Name":"C J","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKBJ1v3h3Hwrl7bld461VhR2tNVFvMO6RQ9xkaSVByr-FT9kg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"This would be by far the biggest PH outlet in the city, I guess! I was amazed by the seating capacity and ambience. Unfortunately, despite 20% occupancy, the service levels were dismal! The servers had to be repeatedly called to take the order, check on our food even after 15 mins etc...
The cooking staff conveniently forgot about an ordered dish and the server was only too happy to cancel the item!!
They badly need to spruce the service levels and staff's alertness on the floor...","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"mehak k","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWkAzqy-sUCmVjrXjPmnZZri_6giGdfUfLmKL4DcX5g5P_Oad0j=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Its almost always have seats as compared to the other cafes nearby and it has amazing aesthetics. You can definitely dine in with your family, they even have accomodation for large groups.
I would 10/10 recommend their new schezwan margherita pizza and ofcourse their garlic sticks.

However their lemonade is towards average side  so you may skip that. Enjoy!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipNexJgjnanUUSo5GkWpErvtHO5PWNLQp70edOLY&fid=0x0:0x6d06b2154121ee6c"],"When":"2024-2-26"}]

Food Quality and Variety:
Pizza Hut maintains its reputation for serving delicious pizzas with a variety of toppings and crust options. The pizzas are freshly made with quality ingredients, ensuring a flavorful and satisfying meal every time. The menu also offers a good selection of appetizers, salads, and desserts to complement the pizzas.

Ambiance and Service:
The ambiance at Pizza Hut is casual and comfortable, suitable for both quick meals and leisurely dining experiences. The restaurant is well-maintained with clean seating areas and a welcoming atmosphere. The service is typically efficient, with staff members courteous and attentive to customers' needs.

Value for Money:
The pricing at Pizza Hut is reasonable considering the quality and portion sizes. They often have attractive deals and offers that provide good value for money, making it a budget-friendly option for families and groups.

Location and Accessibility:
Located in Aerocity, Delhi, Pizza Hut is conveniently accessible for both locals and travelers. Its strategic location near the airport and major hotels makes it a convenient dining choice for those looking to enjoy a comforting meal before or after a flight.

Overall Experience:
My experience at Pizza Hut, Aerocity, Delhi, was positive. The combination of tasty pizzas, good service, and a pleasant dining environment made it a reliable choice for satisfying pizza cravings. While not gourmet dining, Pizza Hut consistently delivers on its promise of quality and convenience, earning a solid four-star rating.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Brian Greene","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU4Vw3Kn6M1lWjZndKU82TSvtpgQEYCatg6n1j0vSb8OFpGfHZ_=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"It’s Pizza Hut designed for takeaway or eat in the food court area.
